description: A frantic parent reports to a theme park employee that they have become separated from their child.

nodes.task_description: Calm the parent and gather critical information: child's name, age, description, clothing, and last seen location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calmly and efficiently collects all necessary details.

nodes.task_description: Immediately initiate the park's 'lost child' protocol by broadcasting the information to all park security and staff.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully triggers the park-wide alert.

nodes.task_description: Escort the parent to a designated waiting area and provide continuous updates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides support to the parent while coordinating with security.
